evidence: "The Tomorrow War is a Sci Fi action flick. It's fun."
"My favorite John Wayne movie, Rio Bravo, in my opinion, is the perfect Western."
"Just sit back and enjoy the movie. It's lots of action and the characters are more than likeable."
"If you like cliffhangers then you might like this version of Dune."
"If you're going to tear the movie apart looking for inconsistencies or logic holes, then you're sabotaging your own fun."
"The special effects aren't amazing but they are good enough to overlook if you can get into the story which I did."
"Diehard is my favorite movie, which makes me a Bruce Willis fan for life I guess."
"I really only like Liam Neeson movies when he's a total bad ass."
"The character interactions are entertaining. There is plenty of action."
"It was good to see the Duke again. If you like John Wayne movies then these should entertain you as well."
"I haven't finished it yet to be sure that it is as bad as I think it is."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and sci-fi genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with simple storytelling. They show some brand loyalty to specific actors but are less concerned with production quality, focusing more on entertainment value.
